title: Full data platform standard business dictionary

methodology.paperIdea: SCHEMA-MINERpro-style full dictionary: generate candidate resource schemas from the catalog, then ground names, aliases, table variants, business domains, and field-like tokens into reusable standard concepts.
generationRules: generate one concept per normalized catalog resource within each business domain
merge duplicate resource concepts by business name plus resource name
attach all catalog rows and preferred table names to the generated concept
derive aliases from resource names, business names, table segments, pinyin-like abbreviations, and known table variants
